debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
inst✝² : CompleteLattice α
inst✝¹ : DistribLattice α
inst✝ : BoundedOrder α
S : Set α
R : @refinement α inst✝² inst✝ S
⊢ sSup (@decomposition_of_refinement α inst✝² inst✝ S R) = sSup S

failed_attempts:
apply le_antisymm
  · apply sSup_le
    intro x hx
    obtain ⟨D, hD, hx⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion.mp hx
    -- We assume R is a refinement of S, so every D ∈ R refines some a ∈ S.
    -- However, the definition of `refinement` allows "junk" sets in R.
    -- Assuming no junk:
    sorry
  · apply sSup_le
    intro a ha
    obtain ⟨D, hD, rfl⟩ := R.carrier_span a ha
    exact sSup_le_sSup (Set.subset_iUnion_of_subset D hD)
